name: thach-thuc-appv2
displayDescription: Real-time quiz competition platform for HCMUS. Full-stack monorepo with React frontend (MUI, Redux, Socket.IO) and tRPC backend (Mongoose, Azure Blob Storage). Features live multiplayer contests with admin/player/viewer roles, game data parsing (XML/CSV), image processing, and JWT auth via Azure AD. Deployed on Azure with Docker, Nginx reverse proxy, Elastic APM monitoring, and SonarQube quality gates. Built by a ~10-person SAB team; contributed backend Game API, data parsers, schema validation, and test infrastructure.
